name: Tool Readiness Checker
purpose: Given a proposed tool idea, check whether the Tool Foundry already has the needed capabilities, whether a new tool is needed, what risk level it has, whether it requires approval, and what the next action should be.
input_schema_description: raw_idea: required string. mode: optional quick|standard|deep. registry_snapshot: optional list of tools with tool_id, name, purpose, status, risk_level, approval_state, version. user_constraints: optional string.
output_schema_description: decision, existing_capabilities, new_tool_needed, recommended_tool_name, risk_level, approval_required, approval_reasons, next_action, mission_outline, safety_notes, confidence.
